questions.question: What country's holidays include Discovery Day, Natal Day and Fete Nationale?
What actress said of her Gone With the Wind role, "It's better to get $7,000 a week for playing a servant than $7 a week being one"?
What did Amerigo Vespucci realize was a new continent and not part of Asia, in 1502?
What was the first Caribbean country to put a man in space?
What did Twins baseballer Randy Bush teach his young son by saying, "This is the way Kirby Puckett does it"?
What cable TV channel sports the slogan: "Where the past comes alive"?
